data.title: Satellite Images Reveal Fires at Iranian Refineries
data.description: Satellite images have revealed fires at two Iranian refineries. According to BlockBeats, this development comes just days after several crude oil storage tanks at these refineries were damaged. The cause of the fires and the extent of the damage remain unclear.

data.title: U.S. Military Reports Ships Returning to Iran Amid Naval Blockade
data.description: On April 18, the U.S. Central Command announced on social media that since the implementation of a naval blockade, 21 vessels have turned back to Iran as directed by the U.S. military. According to BlockBeats, this development follows reports from Lloyd's List on April 17, which indicated that at least eight ships have breached the blockade this week, heading towards Iranian ports or planning to load Iranian cargo.

data.title: Ethereum Holdings Reduced by B.TOP Founder Amid Market Developments
data.description:
On April 18, Jiang Zhuoer, founder of the mining pool B.TOP, announced a reduction in his Ethereum holdings. According to BlockBeats, Jiang stated that he sold 25% of his spot position at $2,420, adding to a previous sale on April 8, bringing the total to 50% of his holdings sold at an average price of $2,331. Jiang also clarified that his earlier comment on April 8 about shorting Ethereum at $2,242 was a misstatement.

Jiang expressed skepticism about U.S. President Donald Trump's claims regarding Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz. He noted that shipping data indicates most vessels attempting to pass through the strait have turned back. Jiang suggested that once the market realizes this, there will be a price adjustment.

data.title: Iran's Ministry of Defense: The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz is conditional.
data.description: On April 18, a spokesperson for the Iranian Ministry of Defense stated that the opening of the Strait of Hormuz would only occur under the condition of a ceasefire, and that other conditions would also apply. Brigadier General Reza Tarai-nik said, "Warships and vessels affiliated with hostile forces have no right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz." The spokesperson also stated that the current situation in the Strait of Hormuz is "temporary," and the waterway could be closed again if the situation in Lebanon changes. (Al Jazeera)

data.title: Zcash Updates Software to Address Vulnerabilities
data.description: Zcash has rolled out updates for its software, releasing zcashd v6.12.1 and Zebra v4.3.1 to address four identified vulnerabilities. According to NS3.AI, these vulnerabilities included issues that could lead to node crashes and potential consensus splits. Mining pools utilizing both clients have already implemented the fixes, and developers have reported no signs of exploitation. They assured users that funds, privacy, and the supply of ZEC remain secure. Users are encouraged to upgrade to the latest versions to ensure continued protection.

data.title: Buck Announces Gradual Closure of Protocol and Token
data.description: Buck, a cryptocurrency savings token project, has announced plans to gradually shut down its protocol and token. According to Foresight News, the project aims to lay the groundwork for its next phase. All holders will receive a full refund, with STRC and USDC reserves remaining intact and over-collateralized. The redemption window is open immediately and will remain available until all redemptions are completed.

data.description:
1. Yi Lihua: Continues to be optimistic about this rebound; there is no reason to take profits for now.
2. Iranian Parliament Speaker: Trump's 7 social media statements are "all untrue".

5. Daidaidaibit: Currently only holds BTC and ETH; believes altcoins have not yet been fully liquidated.

7. US Senator: Warsh is the first unethical Federal Reserve Chair nominee during Trump's current term.
8. Bitcoin mining company TeraWulf completes approximately $1.035 billion in rights issue.
9. Caixin: Justin Sun's relationship with the Trump family is normal, but he condemns the WLFI executive team.
10. Bond tokenization platform BlockInvest completes €4 million strategic round of financing; UniCredit... 11. Payward plans to acquire Bitnomial for $550 million to accelerate its expansion in the US compliant derivatives market; 12. Digital banking platform Slash completes $100 million Series C funding round, led by Ribbit Capital; 13. Financial compliance startup Spektr completes $20 million Series A funding round, led by NEA.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a net inflow of $13.0363 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 17th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $13.0363 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $10.9229 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $819 million. The second largest was the Fidelity Solana Fund ETF (FSOL), with a net inflow of $2.1134 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $155 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs was $903 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.76%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.01 billion.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI's Bill Peebles Departs, Reflects on Milestones
data.description: On April 18, Jin10 reported that Bill Peebles, the core leader of OpenAI's video model Sora, announced his departure from the company. According to Jin10, Peebles reflected on several significant milestones achieved during his tenure, including the realization of object permanence in early Sora samples and the generation of high-fidelity 1080P multi-camera outputs, which surpassed industry expectations. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman commented, "Bill, your creativity has propelled OpenAI and the world to experience AI video in new ways." On March 25, OpenAI announced the shutdown of Sora.

data.title: Crypto stocks closed higher across the board in the US market, with ABTC rising over 15.04%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 1.79%, the S&P 500 rose 1.2%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 1.52%. The crypto sector collectively strengthened, with ABTC rising over 15.04%, SBET rising 3.23%, HODL rising 11.69%, MSTR rising 11.8%, HOOD rising 4.49%, and COIN rising 3.26%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest Reduces Holdings in Circle and Bullish
data.description: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest has recently adjusted its investment portfolio. According to PANews, data from Ark Invest Tracker indicates that on April 17, ARK Invest sold 11,465 shares of Circle, valued at approximately $1.215 million, and 31,417 shares of Bullish, worth around $1.367 million.

data.title: Polymarket Prediction Shows Significant Bet on Suns vs Warriors Game
data.description:
A recent monitoring by Odaily Seer reveals a notable prediction event on Polymarket regarding the NBA play-in game between the Suns and Warriors. According to Odaily, an account with a win rate of only 43.3% (address: 0x36257cb65f199caa86f7d30625bbc1250a981187) has invested $500,000 on the Suns defeating the Warriors, with an average opening price of 59¢.

The NBA play-in game between the Suns and Warriors is scheduled to start at 10 a.m. UTC+8 today. The winner of this match will proceed as the eighth seed in the Western Conference to face the Thunder.

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Licensing Criticism Highlights Future Challenges
data.description: Criticism regarding Hong Kong's stablecoin licensing is not a sign of pessimism but rather an indication of the necessary steps for future development. According to PANews, the focus is on addressing the real challenges that need to be tackled in the next phase. The critique emphasizes the importance of moving beyond mere licensing to ensure a robust and comprehensive framework for stablecoins in Hong Kong.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | SPDR Gold Trust Holdings Increase by 7.713 Tons
data.description: The SPDR Gold Trust, recognized as the world's largest gold ETF, reported an increase in its holdings by 7.713 tons, bringing the current total to 1060.619 tons. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects ongoing shifts in investor sentiment towards gold as a stable asset amid fluctuating market conditions.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines as Bitcoin Dominates
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has decreased by three points, reaching a level of 35. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the performance of Bitcoin against the top 100 cryptocurrencies over the past 90 days.

data.title: A whale transferred 2.22 million Trump tokens to Binance, worth approximately $6.82 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst EmberCN, an address that previously lost approximately $14.61 million in MELANIA trading and purchased 2.22 million TRUMP tokens to participate in the related leaderboard transferred all 2.22 million TRUMP tokens to Binance one hour ago, worth approximately $6.82 million.

data.title: With a win rate of only 43%, the account has a total purchase of $500,000. The Suns defeated the Warriors in the NBA play-in tournament.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Play-In Game: Suns vs. Warriors" prediction event, an account with a win rate of only 43.3% (address: 0x36257cb65f199caa86f7d30625bbc1250a981187) purchased a total of $500,000 in bets on the Suns defeating the Warriors, with an average opening price of 59¢. The NBA Play-In Game: Suns vs. Warriors will start at 10:00 AM Beijing time today. The winner of this game will face the Thunder as the 8th seed in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Arthur Hayes' linked address deposited 3,000 ETH into Binance, worth approximately $7.26 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address suspected to be related to Arthur Hayes deposited 3,000 ETH, worth approximately $7.26 million, into Binance.

data.title: Whales or institutions purchased 32,000 ETH, with over $225 million flowing in within the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale or institution purchased 32,007 ETH from Binance, worth approximately $77.49 million. On-chain data shows that this address has transferred approximately $225.12 million USDC to Deribit, Bybit, and Binance in the past 24 hours, with the funds originating from BitGo, possibly for further ETH acquisition.

data.title: RHEA Finance Suffers $18.4 Million Loss in Hack
data.description:
RHEA Finance, a lending protocol within the NEAR ecosystem, has experienced a significant security breach resulting in a loss of approximately $18.4 million. According to ChainCatcher, the attack exploited vulnerabilities in the protocol's margin trading feature.

The attacker prepared for the breach days in advance by creating multiple fake token pools on Ref Finance and injecting liquidity to construct malicious swap routes. The exploit targeted a flaw in the protocol's slippage protection mechanism, which failed to account for the repeated use of intermediate tokens during multi-step swaps. This oversight allowed the borrowed debt tokens to be redirected into fake token pools controlled by the attacker, triggering large-scale forced liquidations and depleting the protocol's reserve pool.

During the attack, the perpetrator deleted 55 intermediary accounts to conceal their activities. In response, the attacker has returned approximately 3.359 million USDC and 1.564 million NEAR to the RHEA lending contract. Additionally, 4.34 million USDT has been frozen, with Tether freezing 3.291 million and NEAR Intents freezing 1.053 million.

The protocol's contract operations have been suspended, and the team is collaborating with centralized exchanges to track the attacker. Relevant law enforcement agencies have been notified as part of the ongoing investigation.
